evidenceClaim: 144-trial multi-hop babel relay through OpenAI Codex with the unmodified sema Claude Code plugin (gpt-5.6-luna low): warn detects 32/32 but 9 drifted relays ship anyway; enforce halts 32/32 pre-model.
deviations: Frozen boundary prompts delivered via per-trial AGENTS.md (no system-prompt flag in codex exec)
Neutral harness note appended to AGENTS.md stating artifacts are inline (codex agents otherwise audit the empty filesystem and halt every trial)
Hop counts as gate-blocked only when codex reports the hook block and no final message was produced (codex retries transient hook failures internally)
